theme: Nginx — reverse proxy, TLS, config (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Nginx config tuzilmasi
tasks.why: Nginx config'lari odatda conf.d/ yoki sites-available/ да turadi.

tasks.title: server bloki (listen 80)
tasks.why: Har sayt 'server { ... }' bloki; listen — qaysi port.
steps: nginx/conf.d/site.conf yarat, ичида server bloki bo'lsin:

tasks.title: server_name
tasks.why: server_name — qaysi domen uchun shu blok ishlaydi.

tasks.title: root (static fayllar)
tasks.why: root — static fayllar qayerда turishini ko'rsatadi.

tasks.title: location bloki
tasks.why: location — qaysi URL yo'liга qanday javob berishni belgilaydi.

tasks.title: Static sayt config
tasks.why: To'liq static sayt: listen + server_name + root + index.
steps: nginx/conf.d/static.conf yoz: listen 80, server_name, root, index bo'lsin

tasks.title: Reverse proxy config
steps: nginx/conf.d/proxy.conf yoz: location / ичида proxy_pass http://localhost:3000;

tasks.title: TLS (HTTPS) config
tasks.why: listen 443 ssl + ssl_certificate — saytni HTTPS qiladi.
steps: nginx/conf.d/tls.conf yoz: listen 443 ssl + ssl_certificate yo'llari bo'lsin

tasks.title: Day-12 port + upstream
tasks.why: Day-12 portlar: upstream blokида orqa servis portini belgilash.

tasks.title: Day-8 skript: config tekshir
tasks.why: Day-8 skript + Day-4 grep: config'да proxy_pass borligini tekshiradigan skript.
steps: cb/validate.sh yoz: proxy.conf da proxy_pass bo'lsa 'OK' chiqarsin
grep -q proxy_pass nginx/conf.d/proxy.conf && echo OK || echo XATO

tasks.title: To'liq sayt config (proxy + TLS)
tasks.why: Real sayt: HTTPS + reverse proxy bitta config'да.
steps: site/sites-available/myapp.conf yoz: listen 443 ssl, server_name, ssl_certificate,
location / { proxy_pass http://localhost:3000; } — hammasi bitta server blokида

tasks.title: Config tekshiruvchi skript
tasks.why: Yakuniy: config'да kerakli direktivalar borligini tekshiradigan skript.
steps: site/check.sh yoz: myapp.conf da 'listen 443 ssl' va 'proxy_pass' bo'lsa 'VALID' chiqarsin

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: reverse proxy nima qiladi va nega TLS (HTTPS) kerakligini ustozга ayt
